title: Time Rewards
description: This plugin boosts player retention by rewarding active players with fully customizable items after a configurable interval of playtime.
body:
TimeRewards is a lightweight and effective plugin designed to increase player engagement and loyalty. It incentivizes players to stay active on your server by offering them valuable, configurable rewards simply for their time spent online. After a set interval, players can use the simple /reward command to claim their prize and reset their personal cooldown timer.
The core strength of TimeRewards is its complete customizability through an easy-to-use config.yml file. Server owners have full control to define:

- The Reward Interval: Set the cooldown to an hour, a day, or any custom duration in minutes.
- Custom Reward Items: Create a list of any in-game items, specifying quantities and even custom names with color codes.
- All Player-Facing Messages: Personalize every message, from successful claims to cooldown notifications, to perfectly match your server's theme.

Crucially, the plugin features robust data persistence, automatically saving each player's last claim time. This ensures cooldowns are accurately tracked even across server restarts, providing a seamless and fair experience for your community. By implementing this simple yet powerful reward system, you can cultivate a more active player base and give everyone a consistent reason to return.
